_description: Wave 219, canonical facts for the Thiccctionary fictional company. Every generator MUST read this and not contradict it. Add new facts here when established; never let the LLM invent new canon in a single post.

publication.name: The Thiccctionary
publication.rent_1974: sixty-two dollars a month, fully serviced
publication.high_water_mark: Memo 1986-04, the Liebherr T 282B entry, by the Senior Cataloguer

bertram.title: Founder and Publisher
bertram.writes: irregular memos by typewriter, sent by post

constance.title: Director of Editorial Operations
constance.hired_by: Bertram, by post, on advice of an advisor he no longer corresponds with
constance.office_relation: same building as the Senior Cataloguer, one floor down (above the dry cleaner's storage room)
constance.voice: calm, performatively neutral, modern corporate HR register
uses_phrases: thank you for raising this concern
I have added this to our parking lot
let's align on a path forward
constance.relationship_with_bart: cordial, persistent friction, sixteen years of unresolved 1:1 follow-ups

eli.title: Staff Writer
eli.background: from a town smaller than the readership

teddy.title: Junior Cataloguer
teddy.background: philosophy minor, recent grad of a small liberal arts college

precedents.1986-04: Liebherr T 282B, established that engineered industrial vehicles qualify
precedents.1991-11: Toaster, Toaster-Oven dispute, established the Silhouette Test (Style Guide II.2)
precedents.2009-03: Atlantic Giant Pumpkin, established that cultivated subjects qualify (Style Guide II.4)
precedents.2014-09: The Submissions Freeze Proposal, filed by Senior Cataloguer, not adopted

running_threads.the_coffee_machine: Broken since March (year unspecified). Has been a grievance subject in multiple Personnel File entries. Constance has 'routed it to Facilities' three separate times.
